phases.description: Repo policy, legal/safety boundaries, and non-code project definition.

phases.description: Local-first Python foundation, secure profile storage, and encrypted PII handling.

phases.label: PHASE 4

phases.description: Safe manual-only flows for hard brokers and official-channel/DROP tracking support.

phases.description: Adapter fixtures, health checks, contributor workflow, and broker registry quality controls.
phases.label: PHASE 6
